name: plan_quality_result
description: Report the structural quality characteristics of the generated implementation plan. Call this tool after completing the plan generation analysis.

task_count.description: Total number of implementation tasks in the plan

has_plan_header.description: Whether the plan starts with the required header (Risk Level, Domains, Implementation Strategy, Goal, Architecture, Tech Stack)

every_task_has_tdd_steps.description: Whether every task includes RED-GREEN test-first steps (Step 1: failing test, Step 2: verify fail, Step 3: implementation, Step 4: verify pass)

every_task_has_file_paths.description: Whether every task specifies exact file paths in the Files section (Create/Modify/Test)

every_task_has_test_context.description: Whether every task includes Test Context (framework, base class, key dependencies)

every_task_has_commit_step.description: Whether every task ends with a commit step

has_rollback_notes.description: Whether the plan includes rollback or data compatibility notes (required for P0)

implementation_strategy.description: The implementation strategy: direct (Tasks<=3 + files<=5), subagent-driven (Tasks>8 or P0/P1 with 4+ Tasks)

requirement_points_covered.description: Number of distinct requirement points from the input that are addressed by at least one task

requirement_points_total.description: Total number of distinct requirement points identified in the input

plan_content.description: The complete plan content that would be written to .claude/plans/
